name: google-antigravity-codex
description: Codex skills and MCP tools for Google Antigravity CLI and consent-gated direct integrations.

interface.shortDescription: Native Antigravity plugin and guarded local helpers.
interface.longDescription: Google Antigravity Codex provides Codex skills and an MCP stdio server for the official agy CLI, direct chat, grounded search, writing, releases, images, models, and quota. Authenticated integrations become available after explicit user consent.
defaultPrompt: Run an Antigravity plugin doctor check.
